subject: Corrected AAI endpoint & auth with SO APIH override.yaml
commit_message:
Corrected AAI endpoint & auth with SO APIH override.yaml

SO APIH was missing aai endpoint & auth credentials.
It has been corrected

Issue-ID: SO-2788
Signed-off-by: Ramesh Parthasarathy(rp6768)<ramesh.parthasarathy@att.com>
Change-Id: I40ee3b495205cacca740da8668d7c9a38febc1a1
